metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4648
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 6d. "PICK1 and TSPAN7 interaction in neurons. Immunofluorescence labeling of hippocampal neurons (top) shows that endogenous TSPAN7 and PICK1 colocalize to some extent in dendrites and spines. Coimmunoprecipitation experiments on brain extracts using monoclonal PICK1 antibody (bottom) show that TSPAN7 and PICK1 are associated.". Experimental description: Rat embryos (gestation age 18d) were used to culture hippocampal neurons for the experiments and were derived from Charles River, Italy.

from supplemental experimental procedures;

"Primary antibodies against TSPAN7 (gift from Prof. F. Lanza, INSERM Strasbourg France), HA (Roche Applied Science), Bassoon (Stressgene), GluA2 (Chemicon) and PICK1 (NeuroMab) were raised in mouse"

"Primary antibodies against TSPAN7, GluA2/3 (Chemicon), GluA1 (Chemicon), synapsin (Synaptic system) and PSD-95 (NeuroMab) were raised in rabbit."
